001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.AccessDeniedException;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.ReportImage;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.IssueReportRepository;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.ReportImageRepository;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.storage.StorageService;
011import java.io.IOException;
012import java.net.URI;
013import java.util.UUID;
014import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
015import org.springframework.core.io.Resource;
016import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
017import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeException;
018import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
019import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
020
021/**
022 * Implementation of {@link ReportImageService} for managing report images. This service handles
023 * access control, metadata persistence, file storage integration, and retrieval of image data.
024 */
025@Service
026public class ReportImageServiceImpl implements ReportImageService {
027
028  private final ReportImageRepository reportImageRepository;
029  private final IssueReportRepository issueReportRepository;
030  private final UserService userService;
031  private final StorageService storageService;
032
033  /**
034   * Constructs an instance of {@code ReportImageServiceImpl} with the required repositories,
035   * user service, and storage service.
036   *
037   * @param reportImageRepository Repository for {@link ReportImage} entities.
038   * @param issueReportRepository Repository for {@link IssueReport} entities.
039   * @param userService           Service for retrieving the current authenticated user.
040   * @param storageService        Service for storing and retrieving image files.
041   */
042  @Autowired
043  public ReportImageServiceImpl(ReportImageRepository reportImageRepository,
044      IssueReportRepository issueReportRepository, UserService userService,
045      StorageService storageService) {
046    this.reportImageRepository = reportImageRepository;
047    this.issueReportRepository = issueReportRepository;
048    this.userService = userService;
049    this.storageService = storageService;
050  }
051
052  @Override
053  public ReportImage getImage(UUID externalId, UUID imageId) {
054    UserProfile currentUser = userService.getCurrentUser();
055    IssueReport report = issueReportRepository.findByExternalId(externalId)
056        .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Issue report not found"));
057
058    // Check access: user must own the report or be a manager
059    if (!report.getUserProfile().getId().equals(currentUser.getId()) && !currentUser.isManager()) {
060      throw new AccessDeniedException("You do not have permission to view this image");
061    }
062
063    return reportImageRepository.findByIssueReportAndExternalId(report, imageId)
064        .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Image not found"));
065  }
066
067  /**
068   * Uploads an image file and creates a corresponding {@link ReportImage} metadata entry.
069   * <p>
070   * This method performs the following steps:
071   * <ol>
072   *   <li>Validates that the current user owns the associated issue report.</li>
073   *   <li>Stores the uploaded file using the configured {@link StorageService}.</li>
074   *   <li>Creates and persists a {@link ReportImage} entity containing metadata such as filename,
075   *       MIME type, and storage key.</li>
076   * </ol>
077   *
078   * @param externalKey The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
079   * @param file        The uploaded image file.
080   * @return The newly created {@link ReportImage} metadata.
081   * @throws IOException            If an I/O error occurs while storing the file.
082   * @throws HttpMediaTypeException If the uploaded file's MIME type is not allowed.
083   */
084  @Override
085  public ReportImage uploadImage(UUID externalKey, MultipartFile file)
086      throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException {
087
088    if (file == null || file.isEmpty()) {
089      throw new IllegalArgumentException("Upload file must not be empty.");
090    }
091
092    UserProfile currentUser = userService.getCurrentUser();
093    IssueReport report = getReportOrThrow(externalKey);
094
095    if (!report.getUserProfile().getId().equals(currentUser.getId())) {
096      throw new AccessDeniedException("You can only add images to your own reports");
097    }
098
099    // Store the file and obtain the generated storage key
100    String storageKey = storageService.store(file);
101
102    // Create metadata entry
103    ReportImage image = new ReportImage();
104    image.setIssueReport(report);
105    image.setFilename(file.getOriginalFilename());
106    image.setMimeType(file.getContentType());
107    // Store an internal locator; do not expose filesystem paths to clients.
108    image.setImageLocator(URI.create("stored:" + storageKey));
109    image.setAlbumOrder(report.getReportImages().size());
110
111    return reportImageRepository.save(image);
112  }
113
114  /**
115   * Retrieves the raw image file associated with the given storage key.
116   * <p>
117   * This method delegates to the {@link StorageService} to load the file as a Spring
118   * {@link Resource}, which can then be streamed directly to the client.
119   * </p>
120   *
121   * @param key The storage key (typically the generated filename).
122   * @return A {@link Resource} representing the stored image file.
123   * @throws IOException If the file cannot be retrieved.
124   */
125  @Override
126  public Resource getImageFile(String key) throws IOException {
127    return storageService.retrieve(key);
128  }
129
130  /**
131   * Deletes an image belonging to an issue report. This operation removes both the metadata entry
132   * and the underlying stored file.
133   * <p>
134   * The method performs the following steps:
135   * <ol>
136   *   <li>Validates that the current user has permission to delete the image.</li>
137   *   <li>Retrieves the associated {@link ReportImage} entity.</li>
138   *   <li>Extracts the storage key from the image locator URI.</li>
139   *   <li>Deletes the file from storage.</li>
140   *   <li>Deletes the metadata entry from the database.</li>
141   * </ol>
142   *
143   * @param externalKey The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
144   * @param imageId     The external ID (UUID) of the image to delete.
145   * @throws IOException If an error occurs while deleting the stored file.
146   */
147  @Override
148  @Transactional
149  public void deleteImage(UUID externalKey, UUID imageId) throws IOException {
150    UserProfile currentUser = userService.getCurrentUser();
151    IssueReport report = getReportOrThrow(externalKey);
152
153    // Access control
154    if (!report.getUserProfile().getId().equals(currentUser.getId()) && !currentUser.isManager()) {
155      throw new AccessDeniedException("You do not have permission to delete this image");
156    }
157
158    ReportImage image = reportImageRepository
159        .findByIssueReportAndExternalId(report, imageId)
160        .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Image not found"));
161
162    // Extract the storage key from the URI
163    String key = image.getImageLocator().getSchemeSpecificPart();
164
165    // Delete the file from storage
166    storageService.delete(key);
167
168    // Delete metadata
169    reportImageRepository.delete(image);
170  }
171
172  /**
173   * Retrieves an {@link IssueReport} by its external ID or throws a
174   * {@link ResourceNotFoundException} if it does not exist.
175   *
176   * @param externalKey The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
177   * @return The corresponding {@link IssueReport}.
178   * @throws ResourceNotFoundException If no report exists with the given ID.
179   */
180  private IssueReport getReportOrThrow(UUID externalKey) {
181    return issueReportRepository.findByExternalId(externalKey)
182        .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Issue report not found"));
183  }
184}
